title: rubus × foliosiformis
intro: Rubus × foliosiformis, also known as the hybrid black raspberry, is a cross between the black raspberry (Rubus occidentalis) and the thimbleberry (Rubus parviflorus), resulting in a unique plant with desirable characteristics. This plant is rich in anthocyanins and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties, including antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Rubus × foliosiformis include potential anti-cancer properties, improved cardiovascular health, and enhanced cognitive function. Rubus × foliosiformis can be prepared as a herbal tea, juice, or dried extract, and is often used in traditional medicine and as a dietary supplement.
